scenario_name: OKC-1 SGA pressure and efficiency reduction
description: Knicks force SGA into a higher-turnover and lower-efficiency creation game.
Knicks prevent OKC's bench from creating its usual scoring and plus-minus advantage.
Knicks use Towns spacing and drive-and-kick offense to reduce Wembanyama's rim-protection impact and increase three-point pressure.
conditions_used: WEMBANYAMA_BLK <= 2; OPP_FG3A above opponent median; OPP_FG3_PCT above opponent median

description: Knicks win non-Wembanyama minutes and prevent San Antonio from controlling the glass.
Applies OKC-1, OKC-2, SAS-1, and SAS-3 with a 0.75 overlap factor within each opponent.
